description_long: This object consists of three distinct modern houses arranged side by side on individual plots of green lawn, each with unique architectural features. The leftmost house features a dark gabled roof, a covered porch with columns, a driveway, and a swimming pool in the backyard. The central house is characterized by a flat roof, white exterior, a central entry path, and a backyard pool, with minimalistic landscaping. The rightmost house is the largest, with a flat roof, expansive windows, a large patio, and a pool, all surrounded by manicured grass. Each house has visible entryways, multiple windows, and outdoor amenities such as trees, shrubs, and paved walkways. The overall layout suggests a suburban neighborhood setting with clear property boundaries. The materials and design details indicate contemporary construction with a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A set of three modern houses on green lawns, each with unique roofs, large windows, and backyard pools, arranged side by side in a suburban layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three houses, their entryways, driveways, and landscaping, with the leftmost house featuring a prominent dark roof and porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the properties, backyard pools, and the linear arrangement of the houses with visible trees and lawns.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyards, swimming pools, patios, and the flat roofs of the central and rightmost houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the rear and side facades, with clear views of the pools, patios, and landscaping details.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern with Craftsman and Contemporary influences
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent entryways with steps, covered porches, columns, and modern doors; some with driveways and landscaped paths
